name: property managers handling 10-20 rental units/month tool
description: For property managers handling 10-20 rental units/month, inefficient coordination causes extended vacancy periods. We streamline the turnover process instead of manual scheduling and communication via email or phone.
problem_solved: Inefficient coordination of cleaning and repairs during tenant turnover
features: task assignment for cleaning and repairs
